request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how underfunding our military puts our families at risk. The recent cuts mean we can't properly maintain our bases or equip our troops. We're asking allies to do more, but we need to show we're serious too. Every dollar spent on defense is an investment in keeping America safe. #SupportOurTroops #NationalSecurity
